summary: Final verification and durable reconciliation audit for G001-G006. G001-G005 have durable per-goal receipts. G006 final verification reran product-scope lint/format checks, typecheck, tests, Prisma validate, and production build. A raw `npm run lint` attempt failed because committed runtime `.gjc` team worktrees contain nested biome root configs, so final lint evidence uses explicit product-scope paths that exclude `.gjc` runtime state.

commands.summary: Biome traversed .gjc team worktrees and failed on nested root configurations; this is runtime-state interference, not product-source lint failure.

commands.command: npx biome check --write app components docs lib prisma proxy.ts scripts specs tests next.config.mjs package.json tsconfig.json vercel.json vitest.config.ts
commands.summary: Product-scope formatting applied outside .gjc runtime state.

commands.command: npx biome check app components docs lib prisma proxy.ts scripts specs tests next.config.mjs package.json tsconfig.json vercel.json vitest.config.ts
commands.summary: Product-scope lint/check passed outside .gjc runtime state.
Next.js production build compiled, typechecked, generated static pages, and left /packages dynamic after the build-time DB prerender fix.

finalFixes: app/(app)/packages/page.tsx exports dynamic = force-dynamic so the DB-backed packages index is not prerendered without a live database during production build.
tests/p3-contract.test.ts asserts the DB-backed packages index remains dynamic and continues to call listContentPackages(null).
